candidate_findings.finding_label: Rawn's visit to the warden bypassed
candidate_findings.claim: Scene A suggests Rawn will go to the warden before the morning session, but Scene B shows no indication of this happening.

evidence_spans.span_text: Rawn told her he would go to the warden himself before the morning session.
When the adjournment came she found Rawn in the corridor outside the archive room, and his expression told her the meeting had not happened.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The transition may be intentional and could be supported by context outside this two-scene window.
candidate_findings.review_note: Check whether there is additional context that explains the omission of Rawn's visit to the warden.

overall_run_note: Identified a potential progression break regarding Rawn's planned meeting with the warden.
